headline: Prediction: This Stock Could Become a Leader in Advanced Nuclear Energy
summary: Oklo has shed more than 70% from its peak while simultaneously landing federal AI-nuclear contracts and a massive hyperscaler pipeline that rivals see as the future of data center power. Whether that gap is a warning sign or a generational entry point comes down to one critical timeline.
